Uses of Interface
com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.domain.CoordinatorFaultStrategy

Packages that use CoordinatorFaultStrategy
Package
Description
com.distributed2pc.coordinator.config
 
com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.infrastructure
 

  • Uses of CoordinatorFaultStrategy in com.distributed2pc.coordinator.config

    Methods in com.distributed2pc.coordinator.config that return types with arguments of type CoordinatorFaultStrategy
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Map<FaultType,CoordinatorFaultStrategy>
    CoordinatorConfig.coordinatorFaultStrategies(CrashCoordinatorFaultStrategy crash, PartialSendFaultStrategy partialSend, DelayedDecisionFaultStrategy delayedDecision)
    Exposes all coordinator fault strategies keyed by FaultType.

  • Uses of CoordinatorFaultStrategy in com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.infrastructure

    Classes in com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.infrastructure that implement CoordinatorFaultStrategy
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    CrashCoordinatorFaultStrategy
    CoordinatorFaultStrategy that simulates a coordinator crash by setting an atomic flag.
    class 
    DelayedDecisionFaultStrategy
    CoordinatorFaultStrategy that inserts an artificial delay before the coordinator broadcasts its Phase 2 decision, simulating a slow or stalled coordinator.
    class 
    PartialSendFaultStrategy
    CoordinatorFaultStrategy that simulates partial Phase 2 delivery: the coordinator sends commit/abort to only the first count participants (default 1), leaving the rest uncertain.
